title: Pyrex Glass Oval Casserole, 5.8 L
features: Made from Borosilicate glass giving high thermal shock resistance
Ovenproof, freezer, dishwasher and microwave safe
description: From the manufacturer Pyrex Glass Oval Casserole Side handles: help make the casserole easier to hold when taking out of the oven, even with potholders or oven gloves. Non porous material, glass does not retain flavours. Switch between sweet and savoury dishes easily without any lingering tastes. Ideal for stews and slow cooking, preserving the quality of your ingredients. Brown and roast without burning or simmer or steam. Successful results every time! Features: Supports extreme temperatures from -40 ° C to + 300 ° C Thermal shock resistant up to 220 ° C: Pyrex glass can go directly from the freezer at a temperature of - 20 ° C into the oven at a temperature of 200 ° C BPA free, hygienic material that doesn't retain stains or odors Scratch resistant
